caption: A large, multi-story hotel building with a light-colored facade dominates the scene, featuring a distinctive tiered architecture and numerous windows. In front of the hotel, several tall palm trees stand against a pale, overcast sky. A shorter, two-story structure with a grey roof and large windows extends across the foreground, bordering a street. The street level shows a few pedestrians and vehicles, though they remain small and indistinct. The camera remains stationary throughout the sequence, capturing a static wide shot of the urban environment. There are no legible logos or on-screen text visible. The scene is virtually identical across all frames, with only subtle movements of distant figures and vehicles, maintaining a consistent view of the architecture and the palm trees under the muted daylight.
